title: ononis spinosa var. latifolia
intro: Ononis spinosa var. latifolia, also known as broad-leaved spiny restharrow, is a plant species belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Ononis spinosa var. latifolia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and ease pain. Herbal preparations of Ononis spinosa var. latifolia typically involve drying and infusing the plant's leaves or roots, which can be used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
